summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 900

core_modules.description: Primary simulation assembly API; wires backend, environment, dynamics, products, and attributes into a runnable particulator.
Main runtime engine coordinating timestep execution, registered dynamics, and product evaluation.
Configurable physics/formula registry used across dynamics and products.
CPU backend implementation; most suitable default execution target for MCP integration.
GPU-oriented backend; optional/high-performance path with additional runtime requirements.
Minimal environment for zero-dimensional box simulations; good low-friction MCP starting point.
Parcel-model environment commonly used in examples and smoke tests.
Core microphysics dynamic for diffusional growth/evaporation.
Collision-coalescence/breakup dynamic; central for warm-rain process simulations.
Base product abstraction for extracting diagnostics from simulation state.
